    Dependency-injected async function. Fraud check runs first (wrapped in
    try/catch → FRAUD_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE). On fraud flag → throws
    FRAUD_DETECTED without touching the gateway. Gateway charge runs second
    (wrapped in try/catch → GATEWAY_UNAVAILABLE). Decline response →
    throws PAYMENT_DECLINED with the reason from the gateway. Success →
    returns { success: true, transaction_id }.
